about.title: About Me
about.highlight: Software Engineer with hands-on experiences leading full-stack development across POS systems, REST APIs, and web/mobile applications. Skilled in system integration, performance optimization, and modernizing legacy systems. Proven ability to manage small teams, deliver scalable solutions, and align technical implementations with business requirements.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.descriptionId1: Pioneered intuitive user interfaces and seamless user experiences in early-stage startup, securing the 2024 Best Project Award and 3rd place at ITPC; recognized in Top 10 at 2018 Student Exhibition – Sri Ksetra.
experience.descriptionId2: Student Communication UCSP — a platform enabling seamless announcements, messaging & collaboration for students, teachers, and administrators, and diverse full-stack web applications was developed.
experience.descriptionId3: Currently, leading the CityMart development team in building web & desktop applications to deliver scalable solutions, and align technical implementations with business requirements.
